recommendations.title: The Snowman
recommendations.overview: Detective Harry Hole investigates the disappearance of a woman whose pink scarf is found wrapped around an ominous looking snowman.

recommendations.title: Grease 2
recommendations.overview: It's 1961, two years after the original Grease gang graduated, and there's a new crop of seniors and new members of the coolest cliques on campus, the Pink Ladies and T-Birds. Michael Carrington is the new kid in school - but he's been branded a brai

recommendations.title: Rodan
recommendations.overview: Mining engineer Shigeru investigates the disappearance and death of his fellow coworkers when prehistoric nymphs are discovered emerging from the mines. After an attack on the local village, Shigeru heads deeper into the mines only to make a more hor

recommendations.title: Avalanche Sharks
recommendations.genres: Horror, Action, Science Fiction, Adventure, Comedy
recommendations.overview: A snow avalanche awakens humungous, prehistoric sharks that proceed to chomp on bikini clad co-eds.

recommendations.title: Roger Waters: The Wall
recommendations.overview: A concert film that the former Pink Floyd singer-songwriter made on various tour dates between 2010 and 2013, when he was playing his former group's 1980 double-album in its entirety.

recommendations.title: Grease Live
recommendations.overview: After enjoying a holiday romance, high school students Danny and Sandy are unexpectedly reunited when she transfers to Rydell High, where she must contend with cynical Rizzo and the Pink Ladies.

recommendations.title: Mega Shark vs. Giant Octopus
recommendations.overview: The California coast is terrorized by two enormous prehistoric sea creatures as they battle each other for supremacy of the sea.

recommendations.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run
recommendations.overview: When his best friend Gary is suddenly snatched away, SpongeBob takes Patrick on a madcap mission far beyond Bikini Bottom to save their pink-shelled pal.

recommendations.title: The Valdemar Legacy
recommendations.overview: Luisa Llorente, an expert on taxation of old buildings, had recently gone to the Victorian mansion Valdemar to conduct an inventory of property ownership. After she mysteriously disappeared, Maximilian, president of her company, engaged the services

recommendations.title: Godzilla vs. Hedorah
recommendations.overview: An ever evolving alien life-form arrives on a comet from the Dark Gaseous Nebula and proceeds to consume pollution. Spewing mists of sulfuric acid and corrosive sludge, neither humanity nor Godzilla may be able to defeat this toxic menace.
